title: An Eclipse
content:
Let there be an end
     And all be done;
     Pass over, fair eclipse,
     That hides the sun.

     Dear face that shades the light
     And shadows me,
     Begone, and give me peace,
     And set me free.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Dora Sigerson Shorter delivers a powerful performance in "An Eclipse"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
